prompt_text:
### Demographics: 80-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 22 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia; Mild dyspepsia and bloating

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Heart failure: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II)
MASH
Body mass index category: Normal
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
Mild Cognitive Impairment with early Dementia
Urolithiasis (status post lithotripsy)
Community-acquired pneumonia (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger sister)
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 15 years; ~15 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily; Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Donepezil (10 mg nightly), Memantine (10 mg twice daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 56.3 kg; Height 172.1 cm; BMI 19.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 131/73 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.1%; 9 months ago 8.8%; 6 months ago 8.3%; 3 months ago 7.8%; current 6.8%), FPG (12 months ago 209mg/dL; 9 months ago 225mg/dL; 6 months ago 220mg/dL; 3 months ago 188mg/dL; current 157mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 57.3kg; 9 months ago 56.9kg; 6 months ago 56.9kg; 3 months ago 53.7kg; current 56.3kg), Height (12 months ago 172.1cm; 9 months ago 172.1cm; 6 months ago 172.1cm; 3 months ago 172.1cm; current 172.1cm), BMI (12 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 18.0kg/m²; current 19.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 133mmHg; 9 months ago 131mmHg; 6 months ago 128mmHg; 3 months ago 131mmHg; current 131mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 70mmHg; 9 months ago 74mmHg; 6 months ago 73mmHg; 3 months ago 74mmHg; current 73mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 119U/L; 9 months ago 126U/L; 6 months ago 122U/L; 3 months ago 121U/L; current 125U/L), AST (12 months ago 107U/L; 9 months ago 100U/L; 6 months ago 99U/L; 3 months ago 98U/L; current 106U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.5mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.5mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.4mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.4mg/dL; current 1.4mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 40mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 41mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 42mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 41mL/min/1.73m²; current 39mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 157mg/g; 9 months ago 191mg/g; 6 months ago 190mg/g; 3 months ago 187mg/g; current 126mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 83mg/dL; 9 months ago 86mg/dL; 6 months ago 87mg/dL; 3 months ago 81mg/dL; current 84mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 42mg/dL; 9 months ago 46mg/dL; 6 months ago 42mg/dL; 3 months ago 46mg/dL; current 44mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 137mg/dL; 9 months ago 121mg/dL; 6 months ago 140mg/dL; 3 months ago 143mg/dL; current 131mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.0g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 10.2g/dL; current 10.9g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.70 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
